017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv;
018
019import java.io.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
023
024/**
025 * Specialized writer for serializing CSV.
026 *
027 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
028 *    <li class='note'>
029 *       This class is not intended for external use.
030 * </ul>
031 */
032@SuppressWarnings({
033   "resource",  // Writer resource managed by calling code
034   "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for CSV cell quoting/escaping logic
035})
036public class CsvWriter extends SerializerWriter {
037
038   /**
039    * Constructor.
040    *
041    * @param out The writer being wrapped.
042    * @param useWhitespace If <jk>true</jk>, tabs and spaces will be used in output.
043    * @param maxIndent The maximum indentation level.
044    * @param quoteChar The quote character to use (i.e. <js>'\''</js> or <js>'"'</js>)
045    * @param trimStrings If <jk>true</jk>, strings will be trimmed before being serialized.
046    * @param uriResolver The URI resolver for resolving URIs to absolute or root-relative form.
047    */
048   protected CsvWriter(Writer out, boolean useWhitespace, int maxIndent, char quoteChar, boolean trimStrings, UriResolver uriResolver) {
049      super(out, useWhitespace, maxIndent, trimStrings, quoteChar, uriResolver);
050   }
051
052   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
053   public CsvWriter append(char c) {
054      super.append(c);
055      return this;
056   }
057
058   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
059   public CsvWriter append(char[] value) {
060      super.append(value);
061      return this;
062   }
063
064   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
065   public CsvWriter append(int indent, char c) {
066      super.append(indent, c);
067      return this;
068   }
069
070   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
071   public CsvWriter append(int indent, String text) {
072      super.append(indent, text);
073      return this;
074   }
075
076   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
077   public CsvWriter append(Object text) {
078      super.append(text);
079      return this;
080   }
081
082   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
083   public CsvWriter append(String text) {
084      super.append(text);
085      return this;
086   }
087
088   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
089   public CsvWriter appendIf(boolean b, char c) {
090      super.appendIf(b, c);
091      return this;
092   }
093
094   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
095   public CsvWriter appendIf(boolean b, String text) {
096      super.appendIf(b, text);
097      return this;
098   }
099
100   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
101   public CsvWriter appendln(int indent, String text) {
102      super.appendln(indent, text);
103      return this;
104   }
105
106   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
107   public CsvWriter appendln(String text) {
108      super.appendln(text);
109      return this;
110   }
111
112   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
113   public CsvWriter appendUri(Object value) {
114      super.appendUri(value);
115      return this;
116   }
117
118   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
119   public CsvWriter cr(int depth) {
120      super.cr(depth);
121      return this;
122   }
123
124   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
125   public CsvWriter cre(int depth) {
126      super.cre(depth);
127      return this;
128   }
129
130   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
131   public CsvWriter i(int indent) {
132      super.i(indent);
133      return this;
134   }
135
136   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
137   public CsvWriter ie(int indent) {
138      super.ie(indent);
139      return this;
140   }
141
142   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
143   public CsvWriter nl(int indent) {
144      super.nl(indent);
145      return this;
146   }
147
148   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
149   public CsvWriter nlIf(boolean flag, int indent) {
150      super.nlIf(flag, indent);
151      return this;
152   }
153
154   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
155   public CsvWriter q() {
156      super.q();
157      return this;
158   }
159
160   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
161   public CsvWriter s() {
162      super.s();
163      return this;
164   }
165
166   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
167   public CsvWriter sIf(boolean flag) {
168      super.sIf(flag);
169      return this;
170   }
171
172   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
173   public CsvWriter w(char value) {
174      super.w(value);
175      return this;
176   }
177
178   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
179   public CsvWriter w(String value) {
180      super.w(value);
181      return this;
182   }
183
184   /**
185    * Writes an entry to the writer.
186    *
187    * <p>
188    * Follows RFC 4180 quoting rules:
189    * <ul>
190    *   <li>Values containing commas, double-quote characters, or newlines are enclosed in double quotes.
191    *   <li>Double-quote characters within a quoted field are escaped by preceding them with another double-quote.
192    *   <li>The literal string {@code null} is written unquoted; the string value {@code "null"} is quoted.
193    * </ul>
194    *
195    * @param value The value to write.
196    */
197   public void writeEntry(Object value) {
198      if (value == null) {
199         w("null");
200      } else {
201         var s = value.toString();
202         var mustQuote = false;
203         for (var i = 0; i < s.length() && !mustQuote; i++) {
204            var c = s.charAt(i);
205            if (c == ',' || c == '"' || c == '\r' || c == '\n')
206               mustQuote = true;
207         }
208         if (mustQuote) {
209            w('"');
210            for (var i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) {
211               var c = s.charAt(i);
212               if (c == '"')
213                  w('"');  // RFC 4180: escape embedded quote by doubling it
214               w(c);
215            }
216            w('"');
217         } else {
218            w(s);
219         }
220      }
221   }
222}
